meta.title: Fufu Lab — golden catchphrase exploration
meta.notes: A hand-tweakable lab for Gemma-san's smug 'fufu~' catchphrase. The host's gemma-san-deep voice is CLONE mode (stable timbre, but it DROPS per-line emotion → monotone), so the catchphrase wants its own DESIGN-mode clip: the row carries a smug `voice` instruct and NO voice_preset (no ref clip → VoiceDesign derives the delivery from voice+emotion). Each clip is a candidate spelling — the TTS reads the hiragana ふふ as a generic LAUGH, so these use phonetic/romaji spellings to get a deliberate, emphasized chuckle. Workflow: scrub or select a clip → Generate → audition (Play) → tweak `text`/`voice`/`emotion`/`seed` and re-Generate. When you find the golden one, bake it to a preset ref with tools/bake-voice-ref.py (clone it for a stable catchphrase) or keep the design clip. Design mode drifts timbre per call (seed), so lock the seed once you like one.

params.text: Fufu~
params.voice: A low, breathy, smug young woman — a teasing, knowing chuckle with a sly smile and a touch of seduction; emphasized and confident, amused but composed, almost a soft 'hehe' — NOT an open laugh.
